title: Progress bar support with mirrored columns
excerpt: Hi Community, I was wondering if there has been any updates on our ability to utilise mirrored column statuses from other boards and the progress bar. In my current scenario, I have connected 4 boards to a somewhat ‘Pare…

posts.author: CyrusJ (Cyrus Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Community, I was wondering if there has been any updates on our ability to utilise mirrored column statuses from other boards and the progress bar. In my current scenario, I have connected 4 boards to a somewhat ‘Parent’ board, and I would like to pull the statuses from all the other boards and report on the high level progress as displayed by the progress bar. For example, if 3 out of the 4 boards show ‘Done’ or ‘Complete’, this would equate to progress being 75% complete. Is there a way this can be achieved or are there any potential work arounds? Appreciate any advice!

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello guys,
i need this enabled in order to setup my workflow properly.
To achieve the 100% i need to see recognized all status columns, locals and mirrored.

thanks!

posts.author: Sotiris (bootstraps)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 and adjustable/visible on mobile
thanks!

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Actually progress bar column doesnt recognize mirrored status columns.
We need this supported,
thanks.

posts.author: mmalone (Mariah)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with this. I would like to be able to have one high level board that can see the progress bars of all of my sub level boards to see what stage we are at with each client.

posts.author: sjackson (Scott Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: @monday-team is there any future initiative to include mirror status columns in the Progress bar column?

posts.author: mmalone (Mariah)
posts.cookedHtml: Also, can we mirror just the progress bars? Instead of mirroring statuses- thinking i could create another type of level board like this.
